# VariScout

> Structured investigation for process improvement. Browser-based, customer-owned data, local-cache capable. V1 is a local-first desktop Workspace app with build-time `free`, `individual`, and `company` channels. Live membership/ACLs, Azure document persistence, product-mobile surfaces, and in-product voice capture are cut from V1. VariScout Process remains named-future.

Entry points for AI agents working in this repo. Humans should start at [`docs/index.md`](index.md).

## Router: pick the right surface

**Need orientation?** Invoke the `agent-context-quickstart` skill — 5-minute project briefing covering wedge V1 direction, hard invariants, ESLint-enforced rules, common pitfalls.

**Need to find a doc?** Invoke the `docs-toolbox` skill — `pnpm docs:find / docs:get / docs:related / docs:recent` retrieval surface.

**Need to know which package CLAUDE.md to load?** Invoke the `package-router` skill.

**Need to read/write Zustand store state?** Invoke the `store-state-glossary` skill.

**Editing any canonical doc?** Read [`docs/agent-context/doc-discipline.md`](agent-context/doc-discipline.md) FIRST. SSoT-by-doc-type rules: design specs edit in place; ADRs append `## Amendment` blocks at bottom; decision-log appends. `*-amendment-*.md` filenames are HARD-FAILed by the validator under `docs/superpowers/specs/`.

## Always-load entry points

- [`decision-log.md`](decision-log.md) — temporal index over canonical doc changes. Read BEFORE re-opening any topic. **Phase 3: now a generated aggregate from `cards/decisions/`; §1/§2/§3 emitted from cards, §4/§5 hand-authored inside HTML markers. Edit cards (or §4/§5 markers), not the aggregate.**
- [`cards/decisions/`](cards/decisions/) — atomic decision cards (one decision per file). Queryable via `pnpm docs:find --tier=card --purpose=decide`.
- [`OVERVIEW.md`](OVERVIEW.md) — what VariScout does + the FRAME → SCOUT → INVESTIGATE → IMPROVE journey.
- [`USER-JOURNEYS.md`](USER-JOURNEYS.md) — V1 Improvement Specialist journey; historical Lead/Member/Sponsor role docs are superseded for V1 by ADR-093.
- [`DATA-FLOW.md`](DATA-FLOW.md) — parse → transform → stats → local artifact/autosave → display → AI pipeline. Azure Blob document sync is historical after ADR-093.

## Canonical V1 strategic direction

- [`07-decisions/adr-092-local-first-variscout-product-model.md`](07-decisions/adr-092-local-first-variscout-product-model.md) — V1 product model: local-first Workspace, `.vrs`/packs as paid artifact boundary, typed CoScout, desktop browser target.
- [`07-decisions/adr-093-v1-simplification-cuts.md`](07-decisions/adr-093-v1-simplification-cuts.md) — V1 deletion record: no live membership/ACLs, no Azure document persistence, no product-mobile shell, no in-product voice capture, one app with channel gates.
- [`superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-local-first-variscout-product-vision-design.md`](superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-local-first-variscout-product-vision-design.md) — accepted local-first product vision.
- [`07-decisions/adr-082-wedge-architecture.md`](07-decisions/adr-082-wedge-architecture.md) — historical May wedge record. Its specialist focus and workflow spine survive; its single-SKU membership model is superseded by ADR-092/093.
- [`07-decisions/adr-084-capability-indices-cp-cpk-only.md`](07-decisions/adr-084-capability-indices-cp-cpk-only.md) — VariScout publishes only Cp/Cpk; Pp/Ppk are intentionally excluded from the product (educational comparison text retained on the marketing site).

## SDD 5-Layer Routing

Per the spec-driven-development design ([`superpowers/specs/2026-05-18-spec-driven-development-design.md`](superpowers/specs/2026-05-18-spec-driven-development-design.md)), agents should read by layer:

- **Need WHY** (vision, principles, market story) → [`01-vision/`](01-vision/) (`constitution.md`, `philosophy.md`, `methodology.md`, `product-overview.md`, `business-bible.md`)
- **Need WHO does WHAT** (in-product personas + journeys) → [`02-journeys/personas/`](02-journeys/personas/) (`lead.md`, `member.md`, `sponsor.md`) + [`02-journeys/ia-nav-model.md`](02-journeys/ia-nav-model.md)
- **Need WHAT system has** (feature capabilities) → [`03-features/`](03-features/) (capability descriptions); each L3 doc carries `kind: ui|workflow|engine|infrastructure` + `serves: [L2 paths]`
- **Need HOW it's built** (engineering design, when complex) → [`05-technical/`](05-technical/) (only present for non-trivial implementations)
- **Need WHY decision survived** (immutable records) → [`07-decisions/`](07-decisions/) (ADRs)

Design specs ([`superpowers/specs/`](superpowers/specs/)) are change-proposal artifacts with `implements:` pointing to L1/L2/L3 deltas. After delivery, they archive to [`archive/specs/`](archive/specs/). Cards ([`cards/`](cards/)) are atomic memory across layers.

Validator HARD-FAILs (M5+): missing `implements:` on specs, missing `kind:` on L3 docs, broken `implements:` paths. See [`agent-context/doc-discipline.md`](agent-context/doc-discipline.md) §Design-spec lifecycle.

## Agent-context entry points

- [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) — Codex entrypoint.
- [`../CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) — Claude entrypoint.
- `../packages/*/CLAUDE.md` + `../apps/*/CLAUDE.md` — per-package context, loaded on demand.
- `../.claude/skills/` — task-triggered skills. See router above.
- [`../.claude/INVARIANTS.md`](../.claude/INVARIANTS.md) — full invariant index with canonical homes + enforcement mechanisms.

## Tooling

- `pnpm docs:check` — diagram health + dead-link scan + frontmatter schema validation.
- `pnpm docs:check:frontmatter` — schema + discipline checks alone.
- `node scripts/check-doc-frontmatter.mjs --diff` — diff-mode checks (decision-log append-only, design-spec `## Amendment`, delivered-by banner).
- See [`../.claude/skills/docs-toolbox/SKILL.md`](../.claude/skills/docs-toolbox/SKILL.md) for the retrieval surface.
